ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "contest_name" TEXT /* Name of the contest */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the contest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the contest */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize awarded for the contest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contest */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer who created the contest */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the contest (e.g., art, coding, etc.) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the contest */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations for the contest */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the contest image */,
  "banner_url" TEXT /* URL of the contest banner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contest (e.g., open, closed, upcoming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation date and time */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, organizer) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the submission */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest to which the submission is made */,
  "submission_code" TEXT /* Code representing the submission (could be a file path or ID) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the submission was created */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the submission won (true/false) */,
  "submission_title" TEXT /* Title of the submission */,
  "submission_description" TEXT /* Description of the submission */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the submission image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest associated with the prize */,
  "prize_description" TEXT /* Description of the prize */,
  "prize_value" TEXT /* Value of the prize */,
  "prize_type" TEXT /* Type of the prize (e.g., cash, gift card, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prizes_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning submission */,
  "winner_position" INTEGER /* Position of the winner (1st, 2nd, etc.) */,
  "award" TEXT /* Description of the award given */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the results were announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_results_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_results_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving feedback */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest being reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments left by the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contest_stats" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "submissions_count" INTEGER /* Number of submissions made by the user to the contest */,
  "wins_count" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the user in the contest */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the user's submissions in the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_tags" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag associated with the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id", "tag")
)
